case_title: LINH TU VS. SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TU, LINH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TU, LINH AS TO DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER SC-108, FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
COPY OF SC-108 REQUEST AND ANSWER FORM SENT TO DEFT SFHA HOUSING CORP.
ORDER ON SC-108A, ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT - DENIED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
